nasb.text: But you shall present a burnt offering, an offering by fire, as a soothing aroma to the Lord: one bull, one ram, seven male lambs one year old without defect;

esv.text: but you shall offer a burnt offering, a food offering, with a pleasing aroma to the Lord: one bull, one ram, seven male lambs a year old without blemish,

cnv.text: 只要給耶和華獻燔祭，作馨香的火祭，就是公牛一頭、公綿羊一隻、一歲沒有殘疾的公羊羔七隻；

ccb.text: 你们要给耶和华献上馨香的燔祭，即毫无残疾的公牛一头、公绵羊一只和一岁的公羊羔七只；
